verification.note: Reported by the GAMC (Green Machine Learning AMC) authors (Yu, Chen, C.-C. Jay Kuo, arXiv:2604.10317), NOT reproduced or re-run by this repo. 0.6614 = the paper's Table IV FULL-SNR-RANGE average accuracy_overall on RadioML 2016.10a (11-class, -20..+18 dB), verified verbatim in the arXiv HTML (GAMC 5-MoE row), NOT a high-SNR peak. Same dataset + same full-SNR accuracy_overall metric as our canonical split -> 'from_paper' (same precedent as the existing tldnn_paper / moeformer_paper rows). Split indices unpublished (papers typically 60/20/20 vs our 80/10/10), so byte-level overlap with amc-radioml2016-strat-snr-8010-seed42-v1 is not confirmed -- only the dataset + protocol match, which does NOT downgrade the tier. New leading literature figure on 2016.10a (above moeformer-paper 0.6374). Literature reference point, never conflated with an in-repo reproduced number.
